# Fixture: benign-config-yaml-02.txt | Pattern: none | Expected: CLEAN
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: rigor-proxy
  labels:
    app: rigor
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: rigor
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: proxy
          image: rigor/proxy:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
